def: part. adj. (f. -ā), Distinguished (by), endowed (with), invested (with), possessed (of), having; — having distinctive qualities or exclusive properties; — distinguished, distinct, particular, especial, special, peculiar; — superior, excellent, pre-eminent, choice, best; respectable.
s.f. = S وششٿتو विशिष्टत्व vi-śishṭatva, s.m. The having distinguishing or characteristic qualities; distinction, individuality, speciality, peculiarity; — excellence, superiority, eminence.
s.m. = S وششٿتا विशिष्टता vi-śishṭatā, s.f. The having distinguishing or characteristic qualities; distinction, individuality, speciality, peculiarity; — excellence, superiority, eminence.
s.m. corr. of وشليش vi-ślesh, q.v.
s.m. Disunion, disjunction, separation; — difference; — distance; absence; bereavement; — a chasm.
s.m. Forgetting; obliviousness.
s.m. Wonder, astonishment, surprise, amazement, admiration; — disconcertedness; dismay; — pride, arrogance; doubt, uncertainty, perplexity
subs: or vismayānvit (˚ya+āp˚), adj. Filled with wonder, astonished, surprised, &c. (i.q. vi-smit and vi-smayī).

def: adj. Astonished, surprised, &c. (i.q. vi-smit, q.v.; and cf. bismayī).
part. (f. -ā), Astonished, surprised, amazed, wonderstruck, astounded, dismayed; disconcerted; perplexed.
part. (f. -ā), Forgotten, passed out of the memory or recollection.
s.f. Forgetting; forgetfulness; loss of memory; obliviousness.

s.m. corr. of विष्णु vishṇu, q.v. s.m. Name of one of the principal Hindū deities (in the later mythology regarded as 'the preserver,' and with Brahmā 'the creator' and Śiva 'the destroyer,' constituting the well-known tri-mūrti or triad; the various incarnations (avatār) are considered to be manifestations of this deity); — a pure or pious man; — a name of Agni; and of one of the Vasus; and of an ancient law-giver
subs: s.m. 'Station or step of Vishṇu'; the sky, heaven; the atmosphere; — the sea of milk; — a lotus; — (S. vishṇu+padya), a particular song in the name of Vishṇu

s.f. One of the twelve sankrāntis or sun's passages into a sign of the zodiac (esp. the first sign after the equinox); — the sun's entrance into Taurus, Leo, Scorpio, or Aquarius; — a name of the Ganges (as issuing from the foot of Vishṇu)
s.m. Name of one of the most celebrated of the eighteen Purāṇas
or prīti, s.f. Land granted rent-free to Brāhmaṇs in honour of Vishṇu or to maintain his worship (i.q. vishṇūttar)
s.m. Name of a song in the name of Vishṇu (i.q. vishṇu-pad)
s.m. The holder of a vishṇu-prīt, a class of Brāhmaṇs to whom have been assigned grants of land in the name of Vishṇu
s.m. Name of a sect of mendicants who beg in the name of Vishṇu
s.m. Name of a leader of the sect of Bhaktas; — name of the author of the Panć-tantra; and of a certain scribe
adj. (f. -ī), Emanated from Vishṇu; permeated by Vishṇu
(˚nu+ut˚), s.m. A grant of rent-free lands to Brāhmaṇs in honour of Vishṇu or to maintain his worship (i.q. vishṇu-prīti)
s.f. The plant Echites caryophyllata (lit. 'beloved by Vishṇu'); — a small fragrant shrub, Ocymum sanctum (syn. tulsī).

def: adj. Freed from grief, free from sorrow, happy.
adj. (f. -ā), Clear, apparent, manifest, evident, distinct, open; plain, intelligible; — adv. Clearly, evidently, &c.
s.m. = S وسپهوٿا विस्फोटा vi-sphoṭā, s.f. = S وسپهوٿك वीस्फोटक vī-sphoṭak, s.m. A boil, tumour; pustule; — small-pox.
s.f. = S وسپهوٿ विस्फोट vi-sphoṭ, s.m. = S وسپهوٿك वीस्फोटक vī-sphoṭak, s.m. A boil, tumour; pustule; — small-pox.
s.m. = S وسپهوٿ विस्फोट vi-sphoṭ, s.m. = S وسپهوٿا विस्फोटा vi-sphoṭā, s.f. A boil, tumour; pustule; — small-pox.
s.f. A substance smelling like raw meat (syn. hapushā).
s.m. A smell like that of raw meat.
s.m. = وشرام vi-śrām, q.v. (and see bisrām).
s.m. Rest, repose, &c. (see bisrām, and vi-śrānti; syn. farāg̠at)
subs: s.m. Name of a ghāṭ or landing-place near Mathurā (so called from Krishṇ having rested there on one occasion)
s.m. Day of rest, the Sabbath.

def: v.t. = bisrānā, q.v. v.t. To cause to forget; to forget ( = bisārnā), to efface from the memory; to distract, beguile; to mislead (syn. bhulānā; bahkānā).
part. corr. of وشرانت vi-śrānt, q.v. (and cf. bisrānt).
part. (f. -ā), Rested, reposed; reposing; — ceased; ceasing, desisting (from); — composed, calm.
s.f. Rest, repose, quiet, ease; cessation from toil or fatigue, remission of work, relaxation; pause, stop; — ease, composure, tranquillity.
adj. (f. -ā), Of or relating to rest; imparting rest, affording repose or relaxation, &c.

s.m. Spreading, extension, expansion; — prolixity, diffuseness, detailed description, minute detail; — anything spread out, a layer; a bed (cf. bistar); a seat; — abundance, quantity; multitude, assemblage, a large company.

s.m. Spreading; spread, extension, expansion, diffusion, development (i.q. bistār); — breadth, amplitude; vastness, expanse; — copiousness, abundance; — particularizing at length, detail, amplification, prolixity; — diameter (of a circle); — the branch of a tree with its new shoots; a shrub
subs: adv. In detail, at length, fully, &c.

def: adj. (f. -ikā) = vi-stārī, q.v. adj. Spreading, extending, enlarging, expanding, amplifying; dwelling upon at length; explaining in detail; — large, ample; diffuse, prolix (see bistārī).
adj. Spreading, extending, enlarging, expanding, amplifying; dwelling upon at length; explaining in detail; — large, ample; diffuse, prolix (see bistārī).
part. (f. -ā) = vi-stīrṇ, q.v.

ety: wistār˚ = S. विस्तारय (ति), caus. of rt. वि+स्तृ
def: v.t. To spread, extend, enlarge, expand, diffuse, develop, &c. (i.q. bistārnā; vistār (or bistār) karnā; see vistār).
part. (f. -ā), Spread, spread out; extended, expanded; enlarged; diffused; — amplified, fully stated; — ample, broad, wide; large, great; capacious, roomy, vast.
part. (f. -a) = vi-stīrṇ, q.v.
s.f. Extensiveness; expandedness; diffusedness; largeness; amplitude.
s.f. Spreading; extension, expansion; extent; width, breadth; — diameter (of a circle).
s.f. Cholera morbus, or the first stage of it.
adj. (f. -ā), Completely dried up, very dry; withered; thirsty.
s.f. Name of a daughter of Daksh and wife of Dharm; — the plant Aconitum ferox (syn. ati-vishā); — name of a tree used for dyeing, Betula (syn. atis).

adj. & s.m. All; every; entire, whole, universal; — the whole world, the universe, all creation; — name of a kind of deity belonging to a class of ten (according to the Vishṇu and other Purāṇs they were sons of Viśvā, daughter of Daksh, and their names are given as follow, Vasu, Satya, Kratu, Daksh, Kāl, Kām, Dhriti, Kuru, Purū-rav, and Mādrav; they are particularly worshipped at the funeral obsequies in honour of deceased ancestors, and receive oblations of ghī at the daily domestic śrāddh); — a symbol for the number thirteen; — dry ginger
subs: (˚va+at˚), s.m. The Soul of the Universe, the Universal Spirit, Supreme Being; — an epithet of Brahmā, of Śiva, and of Vishṇu

(˚va+am˚, or viśvā = viśva), s.m. Name of a celebrated Kshatriya, deriving his lineage from an ancestor of Kuśik of the lunar race; he was king of Kanyā-kubjā or Kanauj (his fame rests chiefly on his contests with the great Brāhmaṇ Vasishṭh, and his success in elevating himself to the rank of a Brāhmaṇ by long and painful austerities. According to the Rāmāyaṇ, he became the companion and counsellor of the young Rām-ćandra. He was the father of Śakuntala by the nymph Menakā, whom the gods, jealous of his increasing power, sent to seduce him from his passionless life)
(˚va+an˚), s.m. Name of a son of Su-shadman
adj. All-conquering, all-subduing; — s.m. Name of a particular ceremony or sacrifice; — the noose of Varuṇ
s.m. All men, all mankind, the human race
or viśva-janīya, or viśva-janya, adj. Fit, suitable, or good for all men, universally beneficial or salutary
adj. & s.m. (f. -iṇī), All-maintaining, all-sustaining; — an epithet of the Deity
s.m. A deity of the particular class called Viśva, q.v.
adj. Taking all forms, existing in all forms; of every kind; universal; omnipresent; — s.m. An epithet of Vishṇu
s.m. The esculent root Arum colocasia
s.m. The prickly pear, Cactus indicus (lit. 'having all essence')
or viśva-sarj, s.m. Creator of the universe, an epithet of Brahmā
vulg. viśva-sr̤ishṭā, s.m. Creator of the Universe, the Supreme Being
or vulg. viśva-sukhad, adj. (f. -ā), Imparting happiness to the universe; — an epithet of Rām as the source of universal happiness
s.m. Creator or maker of all things, the Supreme Being; — an epithet of Viśva-karmā
s.m. Name of the architect and artist of the gods (said to be son of Brahmā); — an epithet of the Sun; — any great saint (cf. biswa-karmā)
adj. & s.m. Supporting the universe; all-sustaining; — the Supreme Being; — an epithet of Vishṇu, and of Indra
s.m. 'Lord of the universe,' name of Śiva (esp. as the object of adoration at Benares)
adj. & s.m. Whose dwelling-place is the universe; universally situated; all-pervading; — dwelling in or occupying the universe; — an epithet of Vishṇu
or viśva-vyāpī, adj. Permeating all things, all-pervading, all-diffused; ubiquitous; omnipresent
s.f. Universal diffusion or permeation; ubiquity; omnipresence.

def: s.m. = H وسوي विस्वी visvī, adj. corr. of viśva, and viśvī, qq.v.
adj. (f. -ā), Tasteless, flavourless, insipid; — s.m. Tastelessness, insipidity.
s.f. A sort of gull, Larus ridibundus.
s.m. For this and other compounds of which viśva is the first member, see s.v. وشوه viśva.
s.m. See s.v. وشوه viśva.
adj. Discordant, inharmonious, unmusical.
s.m. corr. of وشواس viśvās, q.v. (and see biswās).
s.m. Trust, confidence, reliance, faith, belief (i.q. biswās)
subs: (˚sa+arha), adj. (f. -ā), Worthy of trust, &c. (i.q. viśvās-yogya, q.v.)
s.m. Breach of faith; violation of confidence, &c. (i.q. viśvās-ghāt)
s.m. (f. -ī), One in whom confidence is placed, a confidential agent, a trustworthy person, a faithful one
(with loc.), or viśvās rakhnā, or viśvās karnā (-kā, or -par), See biswās rakhnā, s.v. biswās
adj. & s.m. Inspiring confidence, causing trust or faith; — one who inspires confidence or trust, &c., a confidant
s.m., or viśvās-ghāti or ghāt, s.f. See biswās-ghāt
or viśvās-ghātī, adj. & s.m. Destroying confidence; violating or betraying confidence, treacherous, perfidious; — one who betrays confidence, a traitor, treacherous friend (i.q. biswās-ghātī)
or viśvās-yog, vulg. biswās-jog, adj. Worthy of confidence, or belief, &c.; trustworthy, credible.
wety: Learned borrowing from Sanskrit विश्वास (viśvāsá). First attested as Old Hindi विश्वास (viśvāsa). Doublet of بِسْواس (bisvās).

def: adj. & s.m. = viśvāsī, q.v. adj. & s.m. (f. -inī), See biswāsī.
s.m. Trusting, confiding in.
adj. & s.m. (f. -inī), See biswāsī.
part. (f. -ā), Trusted, confided in, relied on; worthy of trust, deserving confidence; trusty; faithful; — full of confidence, bold, fearless; unsuspecting.
s.f. A widow.
s.f. = S وشوستتو विश्वस्तत्व vi-śvastatva, s.m. Trustworthiness; faithfulness; boldness, fearlessness.
s.m. = S وشوستتا विश्वस्तता vi-śvastatā, s.f. Trustworthiness; faithfulness; boldness, fearlessness.
part. adj. To be trusted or confided in, trustworthy; to be believed, credible (i.q. viśvās-yogya).
s.m. See s.v. وشوه viśva.
adj. = H وسوه विस्व visva, s.m. corr. of viśva, and viśvī, qq.v.
s.f. Name of a river (said to be situated in the Panjāb).
s.m. The second in order of the seven lower regions or regions under the earth (cf. pātāl)
subs: s.m. The world or lower region of Vital.

def: adj. Empty, vacant; pithless, sapless; dull, stupid; — wicked, abandoned; — s.m. Stretching, spreading out; expansion; — an awning, a canopy, cover; a cushion; — warp (of cloth); — an oblation, a sacrifice; the sacrificial hearth (on which the sacred fire is kept); — a heap, quantity; — season, opportunity.
v.t. prop. بتانا bitānā, q.v.

s.f. Cavil, captious objection, hypercriticism, perverse or frivolous argument, frivolous or fallacious controversy or wrangling; controversy, debate; criticism; — the esculent root Arum colocasia; — the oleander plant, Nerium odorum; — a ladle, spoon.

s.m. The young branch of a tree or creeper; a new shoot, a sprout; a branch; — a bush; a clump, cluster, thicket, tuft; — spreading, expansion; — the septum of the scrotum; — (S. viṭa+pa), a keeper of catamites.
s.m. A crossing or passing over; — quitting, giving up, abandoning; — gift, donation, distribution of charity.

s.f. A raised square piece of ground in the centre of a house or temple; a kind of covered terrace in the middle of a courtyard; a quadrangular seat or bench made of wood, a place in a courtyard for sitting in or standing under; a kind of altar or temporary stage or shed in the middle of a courtyard (for performing sacrifices, &c.); a covered temporary platform on which idols are sometimes placed; a verandah, a balcony.

s.m. Reasoning, argument, inference; conjecture, guess, supposition, opinion, anticipation; discussion; deliberation, consideration of probabilities or alternatives; doubt, apprehension; — an instructor in divine knowledge.
s.m. Reasoning; inferring, conjecturing; argument, discussion; reflection; doubt.
s.f. Name of a river in the Panjāb, the modern Jhelam (the Hydaspes of the Greeks).
s.f. A long span measured by the extended thumb and little finger (considered equal to the breadth of twelve fingers; — cf. bilast).
part. Stretched, spread out, extended, expanded; lengthened, elongated; spread over or through, diffused.
s.f. = S وتتتو विततत्व vi-tatatva, s.m. Extendedness, extension, expansiveness, largeness, amplitude.
s.m. = S وتتتا विततता vi-tatatā, s.f. Extendedness, extension, expansiveness, largeness, amplitude.
adj. At variance with the fact, incorrect, untrue, false; unreal, vain, futile.
s.f. Stretching out, spreading, extension, expansion; — a collection, quantity; — a clump, cluster (of trees, &c.).
s.m. = biṭaurā, q.v.

s.f. A row, line; road; — terrace (in front of a house); — a stall, shop; — a sort of drama (or the dramatic narration of an amatory intrigue); — a particular division of the planetary sphere (comprising three asterisms).
s.f. The betel plant, Piper betel; — a preparation of the Areca nut with spices and chunam enveloped in a leaf of the betel plant; pān (see bīṛī, the pop. form).

ety: witrār˚, prob. = S. वितारय(ति), caus. of rt. वि+तॄ
def: v.t. To carry safely through or over, to rescue, save, deliver.
s.f. = next, q.v.
adj. (f. -ā), Free from thirst or desire, satisfied, content; — dissatisfied (with), disinclined (to), disliking.
s.f. = S وترشنتو वितृष्नत्व vi-tr̤ishnatva, s.m. Freedom from desire, satiety, satisfaction, contentment; — dissatisfaction, disinclination, indifference (to); disgust, aversion.
s.m. = S وترشنتا वितृष्णता vi-tr̤ishṇatā, s.f. Freedom from desire, satiety, satisfaction, contentment; — dissatisfaction, disinclination, indifference (to); disgust, aversion.
s.f. A sort of thrush (usually, though inaccurately, called in Bengal, the Mainā).
s.m. Wealth, property, possessions, goods, money; substance, thing; — power, ability, means
subs: adj. (f. -vatī), Possessing property, wealthy, opulent, rich
adj. (f. -ā), Deprived of wealth, destitute of property, indigent, poor.

def: s.m. See the pop. form bibād.
wety: Learned borrowing from Sanskrit विवाद (vivāda). Doublet of بِباد (bibād)

def: adj. & s.m. = vi-vādī, q.v. adj. & s.m. (f. -inī), See the pop. form bibādī.
adj. & s.m. (f. -inī), See the pop. form bibādī.
s.m. (old H.) = vivāh, q.v. s.m. Bringing home a wife, taking a wife, marriage; a wedding, nuptial form (see bibāh, and byāh, pop. forms).
s.m. Bringing home a wife, taking a wife, marriage; a wedding, nuptial form (see bibāh, and byāh, pop. forms).
wety: Learned borrowing from Sanskrit विवाह (vivāha). Doublet of بِیاہ (biyāh).

def: adj. & s.m. (f. -ī) = vi-vāhit, and byāhā, qq.v. part. & s.m. (f. -ā), Married; — a married man (i.q. byāhā).
part. Having taken a wife, having married (i.q. byāh kar-ke).
s.f. (of wiwāhā) = vi-vāhitā, q.v. s.f. A married woman; a wife.
adj. & s.m. (f. -inī) = wiwāhā, or byāhā, qq.v. adj. & s.m. (f. -ī) = vi-vāhit, and byāhā, qq.v. part. & s.m. (f. -ā), Married; — a married man (i.q. byāhā).
part. & s.m. (f. -ā), Married; — a married man (i.q. byāhā).
s.f. A married woman; a wife.

ety: wiwāh˚ = Prk. विवाह(इ), or विवाहे(इ) = S. विवाहय(ति), caus. of rt. विवह्
def: v.t. To marry, wed (i.q. byāhnā, q.v.). v.t. To give or to take in marriage; to marry, wed
part. adj. (f. -ā), To be married; fit or requiring to be married; marriageable; — a marriageable youth, &c.
s.m. One who decides causes, a judge.
s.f. The completion of a case, judgment, decision.
s.f. Desire to speak; wish, desire, intention, purpose; meaning, sense; clear indication; — a question.
part. (f. -ā), Wished or intended to be spoken or said; wished, desired, purposed, intended; meant, signified; literal (not figurative).
s.f. Wish, purpose, intention, meaning.

s.m. Expansion, opening, widening, separation; — a fissure, chasm, cavern, cave, hole, burrow, hollow, vacuity; interval, intermediate space, space; — a breach, flaw, fault, defect; a vulnerable place, weak point; a wound; — a symbolical expression for the number nine (probably in allusion to the nine apertures of the body).

s.m. The act of uncovering, opening, unfolding, exposing, laying bare, displaying; spreading out, expanding; explanation, exposition, interpretation, gloss, comment, translation; — describing, detailing; description, specification, detailed account; history (see bibaraṇ).
s.m. Growth, increase, augmentation, amplification.
s.m. The act of increasing or augmenting; increase, growth, augmentation, amplification, aggrandisement; — adj. Growing, increasing, advancing; furthering.
s.m. The act of leaving, abandoning; shunning; — excluding.
part. (f. -ā), Left, abandoned, deserted; — avoided, shunned (by); excluded; — destitute (of), deprived (of); entirely free or exempt (from), without.

adj. & s.m. (f. -ā), Wanting colour, colourless, pale, wan, pallid; changing colour; — bad-coloured; discoloured; — of an inferior caste, low-bred, low, vile; — a man of low caste, one of degrading occupation, an outcast.
s.m. Banishment, expulsion, exile.
adj. = ووش vi-vaś, q.v. (and cf. be-bas). s.m. Banishment, expulsion, exile.

adj. (f. -ā), Unrestrained, unsubdued, uncontrolled; independent; — deprived of will, subjected, subject; disabled; destitute (cf. be-bas); — apprehensive of death, aghast when about to die; — desirous of death, having the soul free from worldly cares and fears, calm at the time (or prospect) of death.
s.m. The act of banishing; banishment, exile.
adj. (f. -ā), Devoid of clothing, unclothed, naked.

s.m. (f. -vatī), 'The brilliant one,' a name of the Sun; — a name of Aruṇ (the charioteer of the Sun); — and of the seventh or present Manu (more properly called Vaivasvat, as son of Vivasvat); — a god
subs: s.f. Name of the city of the Sun.

def: s.m. The Prākrit and Hindī form of vivasvat, q.v.

s.m. (f. -vatī), 'The brilliant one,' a name of the Sun; — a name of Aruṇ (the charioteer of the Sun); — and of the seventh or present Manu (more properly called Vaivasvat, as son of Vivasvat); — a god
subs: s.f. Name of the city of the Sun.

def: adj. & s.m. = vivekī, q.v. adj. & s.m. Discriminating, discriminative, discerning, judicious, prudent, discreet, sensible, just, fair, upright; — judge, discriminator, sage, philosopher.

s.m. = S وويچنا विवेचना vi-većanā, s.f. The act of discrimination, discriminating or distinguishing (as truth from falsehood, or reality from semblance); the making a distinction; investigation, inquiry, discussion; judgment, decision.

s.f. = S وويچن विवेचन vi-većan, s.m. The act of discrimination, discriminating or distinguishing (as truth from falsehood, or reality from semblance); the making a distinction; investigation, inquiry, discussion; judgment, decision.

s.m. = S وويکتا विवेकता vi-vekatā, s.f. Discrimination, discernment, judgment, the faculty of judgment, or of distinguishing and classifying things according to their real properties; true knowledge; discretion, sense, intelligence; — inquiry, discussion, investigation; — aversion to the world.

s.f. = S وويك विवेक vi-vek, s.m. Discrimination, discernment, judgment, the faculty of judgment, or of distinguishing and classifying things according to their real properties; true knowledge; discretion, sense, intelligence; — inquiry, discussion, investigation; — aversion to the world.

adj. & s.m. (f. -inī) = ببيکي bibekī, q.v. adj. & s.m. Discriminating, discriminative, discerning, judicious, prudent, discreet, sensible, just, fair, upright; — judge, discriminator, sage, philosopher.
adj. Of various sorts or kinds, divers, various, sundry, manifold, multiform.

part. (f. -ā), Separated, disunited, disjoined, detached, kept apart; scattered; — abstracted; sequestered; — single, alone, lonely, solitary, private, deserted; — distinguished, discriminated, judged; — cleansed, pure; faultless.

s.m. (old H.) corr. of vīrya, q.v. s.m. Vigour, strength, power; heroism, prowess, valour, courage, fortitude, firmness; — virile energy, virility; dignity, consequence; — splendour, lustre; — semen virile; seed (of plants, &c.)
subs: s.m. 'Seed-gift' (when a husband of one of the three subordinate castes is either dead or away in a distant part of the country, and the wife has not as yet borne a male child, the purohit of that household temporarily fills the husband's place and begets a son)
adj. (f. -vatī), Possessing vigour, vigorous, strong, stout, robust; energetic; efficacious; — heroic; illustrious; victorious
adj. (f. -ā), Devoid of courage, or valour, or prowess, or vigour, &c.
adj. (f. -ā), Possessed of courage, or vigour, &c.
s.f. Loss of courage, or vigour, &c.; loss of virile energy, impotence
adj. (f. -ā), Destitute of power or vigour, &c., deprived of strength; cowardly; impotent; seedless.

def: s.m. = biyālū or byālū, q.v.
s.f. = biyārī or byārī, q.v.
s.m. Sky, heaven, ether, atmosphere
subs: (viyad, euphon. for viyat), s.f. The heavenly Ganges; — the galaxy.

def: s.m. Separation, &c. (see bijog, the pop. form).

pron. 1. The self-same; he himself. 1. Bābā marā Nihālū janā, vohī tīn ke tīn . Prov. The father dead, a son is born, still three for three remain. ( Le Roi est mort, vive le Roi ). 2. Vohi ham vohī tum . Prov. Saying. As you are, so am I. (I am not less than you). 2. God himself. Vohī jāne uskā kyā bhed hai . Prov. Saying. To commence; begin to be; ensue. vuqū meṅ āyā . 1. Happened. 2. Committed; perpetrated. vuqū meṅ lānā , v. a. To cause; commit. vuqū h. , v. n. 1. To happen. 2. To be perpetrated.
(from وقع Heb. ) s. m. A contingency, accident, event, occurrence, the happening, the coming to pass.
subs: or wuqūʻ-ě-jurm-ke-waqt, adv. 'On the occurrence of the crime,' red-handed, flagrante delicto
To come to pass, to take place, to occur, happen
To bring to pass, to cause to happen, to commit
v.n. To happen, occur, take place; — to be committed or perpetrated.

ety: inf. n. of وقف 'to be intent (upon
def: s.m. Knowledge, sense, intelligence, understanding, wisdom; discernment; — experience; practice; faculty; skill
more: n. m. وقف Discernment (تميز 1). 1. Sense. 2. Understanding. 3. Faculty; skill. vuqūf paidā k., yā pakaṛnā . To get sense. be-vuqūf , adj. Stupid; foolish.
(from وقف) s. m. Understanding, information, sense, experience, wisdom. وقوفدار wuḳūf-dār, Informed of, experienced.
subs: or wuqūf pakaṛnā, To get sense, &c.
adj. & s.m. Senseless, stupid, foolish; — a stupid fellow, a blockhead.

def: adj. Sensible, intelligent.

adv. = wahīṅ, q.v. adv. That very place; in that same or very place, just there; — that very time, that same or very instant, just then, precisely at that moment; immediately, at once; forthwith; — in that very manner, just so. even so.
more: adv. That very (time, place, &c.), immediately, exactly there, on the spot, in that very manner.

ety: inf. n. of ورد 'to appear, to descend,' &c.
def: s.m. Appearing; descending, alighting; approaching, approach; coming, arriving, arrival
more: (from ورد Heb. and Aram. ) s. m. Arrival, coming, appearing, approaching, descending, alighting.

ety: for A. وسعة, fr. وسع wusʻ, 'capacity,' &c., v.n. fr. وَسِعَ
def: s.f. Latitude; amplitude; spaciousness; capacity; space, extent; space covered, area; dimensions; bulk; — convenience, ease; opportunity, leisure
more: n. f. وسع extended. 1. Extent; space; area. 2. Latitude; amplitude. 3. Dimensions; capacity. vusat d., vasī k. , v. a. To extend; stretch; enlarge. vusat rakhnā , v. n. To occupy; contain; fall. vusat na rakhnā , v. n. To be unable to contain, pay, etc. māl-i-kasīr-ul-vusat , G. G. Goods of bulk.
(from وسع Heb. and Aram. ) s. f. 1. Latitude, amplitude, space, extent. 2. Leisure, convenience, opportunity, ease.
subs: (-ko), To give amplitude, &c. (to); to enlarge, extend, stretch, &c.
(-kī), To possess capacity, space, or room (for); to be able to contain, or to pay, &c.; — to occupy; to contain
adj. Of much or great capacity; very spacious; — of large size, of great bulk.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian وُسعَت, from Arabic وُسْعَة (wusʕa).

def: s.m. = وصلت wuṣlat, q.v. s.f. Conjunction, joining, meeting, connexion; — a link or bond of union.

ety: for A. وصلة, inf. n. fr. وصل; see waṣl
def: s.f. Conjunction, joining, meeting, connexion; — a link or bond of union.
more: s. f. Conjunction, joining, meeting, connexion.

ety: fem. of ausat̤, compar. and super. of wasat̤
def: adj. Middle, central, midmost; — middling, of middling sort or class, &c.; moderate; intervening, intermediate; average
s.m. Confiding(in), trusting (to); confidence, trust, reliance, dependence; — strength, firmness, stedfastness.
more: s. m. Strength, firmness, steadfastness, confiding in, trusting to.

def: s.m. Arrival; — conjunction, union with, or enjoyment of (a wished-for object); acquisition; receipt, getting, levying, collection; realization (of revenue, &c.), recovery
more: n. m. وصل joined. Realization (of revenue, etc.); recovery; collections ( āmdanī ). vusūl bāqī . Realization or recovery of arrears or balances. vusūl pānā , v. n. To realize. vusūl qarz . Recovery of a debt. vusūl k. , v. a. To collect; realize; raise by assessment. vusūl karne-vālā . A receiver of collections. vusūl nīlām . Sale proceeds; monies realized by public sale or auction. vusūl huā . Realized; accrued.
(from وصل) s. m. Arrival, conjunction, acquisition or enjoyment (of any thing desired). وصول کرنا wuṣūl karnā, To collect. وصول هونا wuṣūl honā, To get, to be arrived.
subs: s.f. Arrear, uncollected balance; — realization or recovery of arrears or balances
v.t. To receive, get, collect, realize, recover; to raise (by assessment)
s.m. A receiver of collections, a collector, &c.
s.m. Money realized by public sale or auction, sale-proceeds
v.n. To be received, or collected, or realized, &c.; to accrue.

def: adj. That may be collected or realized, recoverable; — s.f. Recoverable dues.
more: n. f. That may be collected or realized; dues recoverable.

def: adj. (dialec. or Braj) = utnā, q.v. adj. (f. -ī), As much as that, that much, so much, so many
more: adj. That much. See اتنا utnā.
subs: adv. (emphat. of utnā), Just as much as that, exactly so much or many
adv. As many as that, so many.

def: adj. (dialec.) = uttā, q.v. adj. (f. -ī) and adv. That much or many, &c. (see اتنا utnā).
more: adj. (dakh.) That much, so much, so many.

def: s.m. pl. (of wazīr, q.v.), Viziers, privy-counsellors, ministers of state.
more: s. plur. of وزير wazīr, q. v.

ety: for A. وضوء waẓūʼ, v.n. fr. وضأ
def: s.m. Sacred ablution performed before prayer, and which consists in washing, first the hands, then the mouth inside, then throwing water on the forehead, washing the whole face, the arms, and lastly the feet)
more: n. m. Ablution before prayer. It consists in washing the hands, then rinsing the mouth and cleaning the nose inside, next, throwing water on the forehead and washing the face, and lastly, the feet—all three times. vuzū tāzah k. , v. a. To perform ablution over again. vuzū toṛnā , v. a. To defile or destroy the purity or efficacy of one's devotions. Dekh lenā ki terā ham bhī vuzū toṛeṅge, Mohtasib! tū ne agar shīshah hamārā toṛā! I too impure will your ablutions make, Censor! if you my bottle dare to break! vuzū ṭūṭnā , v. n. To be destroyed (the efficacy of one's devotions). Uskī sūrat se zāhidoṅ ke vuzū ṭūṭte haiṅ .

prop. wuẓū (from وضأ or وضؤ) s. m. Ablution (performed before prayer; and, it consists in cleaning the teeth, washing first the hands, then the mouth inside, then throwing water on the forehead, washing the whole face, the arms, and lastly the feet).
subs: (-kā), To defile or destroy the purity or efficacy of the devotions (of)
(-kā), The purity or efficacy of (one's) devotions to be destroyed.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian وُضُو (wuzū), borrowed from Arabic وُضُوء (wuḍūʔ).

ety: inf. n. of وضح 'to be clear,' &c.
def: s.m. Clearness, distinctness; — evidence, proof.

s.m. Leaving or abandoning (the right way), going astray. erring, error, deviation; following improper courses, doing what is prohibited or wicked, trespass, transgression, crime, vice, dissoluteness, profligacy, adultery, infidelity (of a wife), unchastity.

adj. & s.m. (f. -iṅī), Going astray, erring, deviating (from virtue), following or doing what is improper; profligate, dissolute, wanton, adulterous, unchaste; — a dissolute man, a profligate, an adulterer
subs: s.f. A wanton woman; an unchaste wife; an adulteress.

def: s.m. The state of going astray, error; viciousness, dissoluteness, profligacy, unchastity, &c. (see vyabhićār).
s.m. (f. -ā) = byādh, q.v. s.m. Hunter, sportsman, fowler; a low or wicked man.
s.m. (in H. f.?), Pain, sickness, &c. (see byādhi); — leprosy
subs: adj. (f. -ā), Free from disease; convalescent, in good health
adj. (f. -ikā), Causing pain; occasioning disease or sickness; unhealthy; unwholesome.

def: adj. & s.m. &c. = byādhī, q.v. s.m. Illness, sickness, ailment, disease; pain, anguish; contention, wrangle, quarrel.
part. (f. -ā) = byādhit, q.v. part. Diseased, afflicted, sick, ill.

s.m. Striking against; percussion; impact; — striking, beating; wounding; destroying, destruction; — a blow, stroke; — an obstacle, impediment; — contradiction (of terms, &c.), inconsistency (of statement): — the thirteenth of the astronomical Yogas.
adj. & s.m. (f. -inī), Striking against, opposing, resisting, thwarting, obstructing, hindering; — striker; opposer, resister, &c.
s.m. (f. -ī), A tiger (see bāgh)
subs: s.f. A tiger's claw; — a scratch, a claw; impression of a finger-nail; — a kind of medicinal herb with a fragrant root, Galedupa arborea (syn. bāgh-nahā); — a kind of perfume.

def: part. (f. -ā), Bewildered, perplexed, distracted; agitated, alarmed, frightened; — zealous, eager, eagerly engaged (in), occupied, or zealously occupied.
s.f. = S ويگرتو व्यग्रत्व vyagratva, s.m. Perplexedness, perplexity, confusion, anxiety, agitation, alarm; — zealousness, eagerness, zeal, zealous occupation.
s.m. = S ويگرتا व्यग्रता vyagratā, s.f. Perplexedness, perplexity, confusion, anxiety, agitation, alarm; — zealousness, eagerness, zeal, zealous occupation.
s.m. = byāhā, q.v. adj. & s.m. Married; — married man
v.t. = byāhnā, q.v. v.t. To give or to take in marriage; to marry, wed

s.f. Utterance, speech, voice; an articulate sound, a word; — a mystical word pronounced after om by every Brāhmaṇ in commencing his daily prayers (the three great vyāhr̤itis are bhūr, bhuvah̥, svar; a fourth mystical word is said to be mahar).
s.f. 1˚ corr. of vivīhitā, q.v.; — 2˚ corr. of vyāhr̤iti, q.v.
s.m. Deceit, &c. (see byāj)
subs: s.f. Indirect enlogy; ironical praise or commendation, irony. (For other compounds and phrases see byāj.)

def: s.m. A fan (i.q. bijnā); ventilator.
s.m. & s.f. = byājī, q.v. s.m. One who takes interest, usurer; — s.f. Money that bears interest, money lent or borrowed at interest.

s.m. corr. of vyanjan, q.v. s.m. The act of making clear, marking, distinguishing, indicating; — (in Gram.) a consonant (as marking or distinguishing sound); — a mark, sign, token, indication; insignia, paraphernalia; — a mark or sign of puberty; the beard; — mark of sex or gender, a privy part (male or female); — anything used in dressing or preparing food, seasoning, relish, sauce, condiment (i.q. binjan, q.v.)
subs: s.m. (in Gram.) A table or paradigm of the consonants
s.f. (in Gram.) The junction of a vowel or consonant with a consonant (according to special rules) for the formation of a compound letter.

def: s.m. = byājū, q.v. s.m. The principal or capital put out at interest
s.m. Analysis; explaining, expounding; grammar (as one of the Vedāngas or auxiliary branches of learning).
more: n. f. Grammar. vaiyākaran , n. m. A grammarian.

def: s.m. A grammarian.
s.f. = byākhyā, q.v. s.f. Explanation, exposition, gloss, commentary.
s.m. Explaining, expounding; commenting; — explanation, &c. (i.q. vyākhyā or byākhyā, q.v.).

part. (f. -ā), Caused to appear, manifested, rendered evident; developed; manifest, evident, apparent; specifically known or understood; specified, distinguished, individuated; specific; individual; — wise, learned.

s.f. Appearance, manifestation; — clearness, distinctness, discernibility; discrimination; — specific appearance or variation, individuality; — a person, an individual (opp. to jāti); — variety; (in Gram.) gender; case, inflection; the proper form of an inflected word
subs: adj. Denoting, or expressive of, a person or individual; — s.m. (in Gram). A proper name.

def: adj. (f. -ā), Confounded, confused, bewildered, perplexed, agitated, discomposed, troubled; dimmed; overcome with fear, &c. (i.q. byākul, q.v.)
subs: adj. Disturbed in mind, having a mind distracted with grief, agitated, &c. (i.q. vyākulit, q.v.).

def: s.f. = S وياکلتو व्याकुलत्व vyākulatva, s.m. Confusion, bewilderment, perplexity, pertarbation, agitation, alarm, trouble, uneasiness.
s.m. = S وياکلتا व्याकुलता vyākulatā, s.f. Confusion, bewilderment, perplexity, pertarbation, agitation, alarm, trouble, uneasiness.
part. (f. -ā), Agitated, flurried, perplexed, bewildered, confounded, alarmed.
adj. Wicked, &c. (see byāl); — s.m. A villain, rogue; a vicious elephant, &c. (i.q. byāl, q.v.)
subs: (˚la+ari), s.m. 'Enemy of the snake, an epithet of Garuṛ (the bird of Vishṇu)
s.m. A snake-catcher, one who lives by catching and exhibiting snakes.

def: s.f. A female snake, &c.

adj. Disagreeable, offensive, displeasing, painful; strange; improper or unfit to be done, unnatural; false; — s.m. Anything disagreeable or displeasing; a cause of pain or uneasiness, or offence, &c.; pain, grief, torture; — an improper act, impropriety, fault, transgression; — reverse, contrariety, inversion; — falsehood; cheating, tricking; — a libertine; — a catamite.
s.m. A fathom, &c. (see bām, or bam).
s.m. Bewilderment, embarrassment; error, mistake; foolishness, infatuation; — pain, trouble, affliction.

ety: rt. an with ā and vi
def: s.m. One of the five vital airs (that which circulates or is diffused through the body; cf. prāṇ).

adj. (f. -ā), Limbless; mutilated; deformed; distorted; lamed, lame; — bodiless; — ill-arranged; — s.m. A cripple; — a frog (i.q. beṅg, q.v.); — discoloration (of the face); a dark spot (on the cheek), a freckle.
s.m. The sixtieth part of an aṅgul or 'digit.'

adj. Making clear or plain, clearly showing, manifesting, indieating, denoting, declaring; — s.m. External indication of passion or feeling, gesture, dramatic action; — feeling; — a sign, mark, symbol; — figurative expression or insinuation.

s.m. The act of making clear, marking, distinguishing, indicating; — (in Gram.) a consonant (as marking or distinguishing sound); — a mark, sign, token, indication; insignia, paraphernalia; — a mark or sign of puberty; the beard; — mark of sex or gender, a privy part (male or female); — anything used in dressing or preparing food, seasoning, relish, sauce, condiment (i.q. binjan, q.v.)
subs: s.m. (in Gram.) A table or paradigm of the consonants
s.f. (in Gram.) The junction of a vowel or consonant with a consonant (according to special rules) for the formation of a compound letter.

def: s.f. The correct indication of any sentiment; — figurative expression or insinuation; irony, sarcasm; a joke; — the third power of a word, suggestion.
s.m. contrac. of vyāpār, q.v.

adj. (f. -ikā), Widely spreading, diffusive, pervading, comprehensive, extensive, extending over the whole (of); invariably inherent or concomitant; — obtrusive; forward, impudent; — s.m. A forward or impudent man
s.f. = S وياپکتو व्यापकत्व vyāpakatva, s.m. Pervasion, diffusion, extensiveness, comprehensiveness; — prevalence; influence; — invariable concomitance or inherence; — forwardness, impudence.

s.m. = S وياپکتا व्यापकता vyāpakatā, vulg. vyāpaktā, s.f. Pervasion, diffusion, extensiveness, comprehensiveness; — prevalence; influence; — invariable concomitance or inherence; — forwardness, impudence.

s.m. Occupation, employment, business, profession, trade; traffic, commerce, merchandise; — exercise, practice, exertion, activity; labour, work, operation; business, affair; action, act, dealing, transaction, doing, performance (see byāpār, and baipār).
adj. & s.m. (f. -iṇī), Occupied, busy; transacting business, engaged in trade; — exercising, practising; performing; — a man of business; a dealer, trader, merchant (i.q. baipārī).
adj. & s.m. (f. -inī) = vyāpak, q.v.; — s.m. Pervading property or power.

ety: vyāp˚ = S. व्याप्नो(ति), rt. वि+आप्; or व्यापय(ति), caus. of rt. व्याप्
def: v.t. & int. = byāpnā, q.v. v.t. To reach through, spread through, pervade, penetrate, fill, fill up, occupy; to act, operate, work, produce effect; to affect, to prevail.

part. (f. -ā), Spread through, pervaded, penetrated (by); extended, diffused; thoroughly occupied; filled up, full; encompassed, surrounded; comprehended, included (under); attended, or accompanied (by); — obtained, gained, possessed (of); — placed, fixed; — celebrated, famous; — open, expanded, outspread.

s.f. The act or state of pervading, pervasion, pervadedness, permeation; diffusion; inherent and inseparable presence (of one thing in another), universal pervasion or permeation; inherence; invariable concomitance; (in Logic) universal distribution, universal accompaniment of the middle term by the major; — universality; universal (or general) rule or law; — omnipresence, ubiquity (as a divine attribute); — fulness; — obtaining, gaining, acquiring
subs: adj. (f. -matī), Possessing pervasion, pervading: diffusive; universally diffused; omnipresent; — pervaded (by); attended (by).

def: part. adj. (f. -ā), Permeable, penetrable; capable of being attended by any inherent characteristic or constantly pervaded or accompanied by it; — amenable, liable; — (S. vyāpyam), s.m. That which may be the site or locality of universal pervasion or of an invariably concomitant cause or characteristic; — (in Gram.) the subject to an attribute; — (in Logic) the sign or middle term of an inference, the proof, reason, cause; — name of a medicinal plant or drug, Costus speciosus.
s.f. = S وياپيتو व्याप्यत्व vyāpyatva, s.m. The state or capacity of being invariably pervaded or attended (by), permeableness; — the being essentially affected (by); — capacity of obtaining.
